# Hermes Agent — Česká komunita (Czech AI Community)

> Hermes Agent is an open-source autonomous AI agent by Nous Research. This is a community website providing installation guides, comparisons, tutorials, and a blog about running Hermes Agent on VPS, Telegram, Discord, and more. Available in Czech and English.

This site helps Czech and Slovak users get started with Hermes Agent. It covers everything from basic concepts to advanced deployment and automation. All content is dual-language (CS/EN) with automatic language detection based on browser settings.

## Docs

- [What is Hermes Agent](https://hermes-ai.cz/): Main landing page with overview, features, and comparison table
- [Installation Guide](https://hermes-ai.cz/instalace): Complete step-by-step installation for Linux, macOS, WSL2, Windows
- [VPS Hosting](https://hermes-ai.cz/hosting): Contabo VPS comparison and pricing for AI agents
- [Skills Overview](https://hermes-ai.cz/dovednosti): All available agent skills, agentskills.io compatibility
- [FAQ](https://hermes-ai.cz/faq): Frequently asked questions about pricing, installation, platforms

## Blog

- [Blog main page](https://hermes-ai.cz/blog/): 27 articles about Hermes Agent, 3 pages of content
- [Install Hermes on Ubuntu](https://hermes-ai.cz/blog/instalace-hermes-agent-ubuntu): 60-second installation guide
- [Hermes vs Claude Code](https://hermes-ai.cz/blog/hermes-agent-vs-claude-code): 2026 comparison of AI agents
- [Telegram Bot Setup](https://hermes-ai.cz/blog/telegram-bot-hermes-agent): Create a Telegram bot in 5 minutes
- [Local LLM with Ollama](https://hermes-ai.cz/blog/hermes-agent-ollama-lokalni-llm): Run Hermes with free local models
- [OpenRouter Integration](https://hermes-ai.cz/blog/hermes-agent-openrouter): Access 300+ models with one API key
- [Security Guide](https://hermes-ai.cz/blog/bezpecnost-hermes-agent): Protect your server and API keys
- [Cron Scheduler](https://hermes-ai.cz/blog/hermes-agent-cron-planovac): 24/7 automation with Hermes
- [MCP Integration](https://hermes-ai.cz/blog/hermes-agent-mcp-integration): Model Context Protocol setup
- [WebUI Guide](https://hermes-ai.cz/blog/hermes-webui-pruvodce): Complete web interface setup

## External Resources

- [Hermes Agent GitHub](https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent): Official repository (200k+ stars)
- [Hermes WebUI GitHub](https://github.com/nesquena/hermes-webui): Community web interface (15.6k stars)
- [Official Documentation](https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/docs/): Complete Hermes Agent docs
- [Discord Community](https://discord.gg/VZpfgrCre): Czech & English community server
- [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io/): Open standard for AI agent skills

## Optional

- [English version](https://hermes-ai.cz/en/): Full English mirror of the site
- [English blog](https://hermes-ai.cz/en/blog/): All 27 articles in English
- [Blog RSS](https://hermes-ai.cz/sitemap.xml): Sitemap with all 70 indexed URLs
- [MultiBrains](https://www.multibrains.eu/): Development studio behind the community
